nasb.text: Moab has been destroyed and men have gone up to his cities; His choicest young men have also gone down to the slaughter,” Declares the King, whose name is the Lord of hosts.

esv.text: The destroyer of Moab and his cities has come up, and the choicest of his young men have gone down to slaughter, declares the King, whose name is the Lord of hosts.

cnv.text: 摩押被毀滅；敵人上來攻擊它的城鎮； 摩押最精銳的少年下去被屠殺。” 這是君王的宣告，他的名是萬軍之耶和華。

ccb.text: 摩押要灭亡了， 她的城邑要被摧毁， 她最勇敢的青年将被杀戮。 这是名叫万军之耶和华的君王说的。
